title: Cindgylny Garlicky Fluffy Tagine
description: An indulgent Russian dish featuring kabse spice, miso-marinate and perfectly fluffy texture in a ceramic tange vessel.

ingredients.name: 1 can cannellini beans, drained and rinsed

instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in kabse spice blend and cook for another minute.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, stir in miso paste, and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in quinoa and beans, and continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes or until liquid is absorbed.
Garnish with fresh parsley just before serving.
